holdings.infoBox: CAML is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.82%, Apple at 5.61%, Microsoft at 4.74%, Alphabet at 4.64%, and Broadcom at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Congress Large Cap Growth ETF (CAML) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks long-term capital growth through investments in large-cap companies believed to be experiencing or will experience earnings growth. CAML was launched on Aug 22, 2023 and is issued by Congress.
